<!--
Thanks for contributing to vibe-init. Fill out the sections that apply;
delete the ones that don't. Keep PRs focused — one concern per PR.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. Why does this change exist? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-visible capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — internal change, no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, CI

## What changed

<!-- A short list of the concrete changes. File paths help. -->

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (unit + integration)
- [ ] `npm run build` produces a runnable `build/index.js`
- [ ] New behavior covered by tests (unit and/or integration)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected command(s)

## Governance impact

<!--
For changes to .vibe/policies/, src/governance/, or auto-skills:
which projects would this newly flag or unflag? Any breaking changes
to the audit grade for downstream users?
-->

- [ ] No governance/policy changes
- [ ] Governance change documented in `CHANGELOG.md`

## Documentation

- [ ] `README.md` updated (if user-visible behavior changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `Unreleased` entry added
- [ ] CLI help text updated (if commands/flags changed)

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->
